chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4468 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.19320/2017 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2025 Mr. Ajeet Sundar, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.2 and 3 which is taken on record. This petition challenges final assessment order passed. No case is demonstrated as to why direct recourse in writ jurisdiction is taken and why objections there against were not assailed in appellate hierarchy. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
